data.content: Implementation review rejected: bun run test fails at knots-backend.test.ts:551 (child?.parent is undefined not '8792'). Root cause is alias/aliases field name mismatch between MockKnot (alias?: string singular) and KnotRecord (aliases?: string[] plural). The implementation reads knot.aliases?.[0] and record.aliases to build aliasToId, but mock data sets alias (singular), leaving aliases undefined. Fix requires either updating MockKnot+test data to use aliases: ['brutus-8792.5'] or normalizing alias→aliases in the backend code. Also check real kno CLI output shape to confirm which field name is returned.
